    1. PROTOCOL()

Class PROTOCOL

java.lang.Object
Protocol.PROTOCOL
public class PROTOCOL extends Object
Protocol constants for the Quarto game client-server communication. Based on TCS Module 2 Implementation Project 2025/2026 specification. Message format: COMMAND~arg1~arg2~... Commands are terminated by newline (\n).

  • Field Details

    • SEPARATOR

      public static final String SEPARATOR
      Separator character used between command and arguments
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • HELLO

      public static final String HELLO
      Initiates/responds to handshake. Client: HELLO~[~extension]* Server: HELLO~[~extension]*
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • LOGIN

      public static final String LOGIN
      Client: Claims a username. Format: LOGIN~ Server: Confirms successful login. Format: LOGIN
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ALREADYLOGGEDIN

      public static final String ALREADYLOGGEDIN
      Username is already taken. Format: ALREADYLOGGEDIN
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • LIST

      public static final String LIST
      Client: Requests list of logged-in users. Format: LIST Server: Returns users. Format: LIST[~username]*
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • QUEUE

      public static final String QUEUE
      Toggle queue status. Format: QUEUE With NAMEDQUEUES extension: QUEUE[~name]
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • NEWGAME

      public static final String NEWGAME
      Server notifies game start. Format: NEWGAME~~ First player listed makes the first move.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MOVE

      public static final String MOVE
      Client: Submits a move. First move: MOVE~ (give piece to opponent) Subsequent: MOVE~~ (place piece, give next) Server: Broadcasts move to all players in game. Values: 0-15 = piece/position, 16 = claim Quarto, 17 = final piece no claim
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • GAMEOVER

      public static final String GAMEOVER
      Game ended. Format: GAMEOVER~[~winner] Reasons: VICTORY, DRAW, DISCONNECT
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • VICTORY

      public static final String VICTORY
      Game ended with a winner
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DRAW

      public static final String DRAW
      Game ended in a draw
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DISCONNECT

      public static final String DISCONNECT
      Game ended due to player disconnect
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ERROR

      public static final String ERROR
      Protocol violation. Format: ERROR[~description]
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CHAT

      public static final String CHAT
      Client: Broadcast message. Format: CHAT~ Server: Delivers message. Format: CHAT~~
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • WHISPER

      public static final String WHISPER
      Private message. Format: WHISPER~invalid input: '<'recipient/sender>~
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CANNOTWHISPER

      public static final String CANNOTWHISPER
      Private message delivery failed. Format: CANNOTWHISPER~
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RANK

      public static final String RANK
      Client: Request rankings. Format: RANK Server: Return rankings. Format: RANK[~username~score]*
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • WRONGKEY

      public static final String WRONGKEY
      Authentication failed with different public key. Format: WRONGKEY
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CLAIM_QUARTO

      public static final int CLAIM_QUARTO
      Claim Quarto (used as M value in MOVE command)
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • FINAL_PIECE_NO_CLAIM

      public static final int FINAL_PIECE_NO_CLAIM
      Place final piece without claiming Quarto
      See Also:
